textByHash.b0b8180b57755c71bc2c38afe15551a8dcdc28f6: Hello there Zanik! How can I help?
textByHash.d4a4ca1b004824e05b4582738910db5726d0b2a6: All sorts of foods! There are lots of kinds of fish, and there are stews, pizzas, bread, baked potatoes...
textByHash.adbfae78139e8ddc9b27c0e4bfa1797b7cd113dc: I'm sure you'll like them! What about you? Can I help you?
textByHash.230eb5150b383c1bc865a74d69d6a82c0d13ca86: The simplest thing to cook is raw meat or fish.
textByHash.57e6dfbf45a3c58203a6017de66671933b6023eb: Fish can be caught, speak to the fishing tutor south of here in the swamp. Killing cows or chickens will yield raw meat to cook too.
textByHash.01118125cde363fcdf78f2bd89ff447a79734018: You can use your own fire... but it's not as effective and you'll burn more. To build a fire use a tinderbox on logs.
textByHash.cdef7070528c3d2045f50cc1b87c343b807774c1: Once you've found your range, click on it. This will bring up a menu of the food you can cook.
textByHash.e750cadc604ccdb3c30c4141fdeab5ac399a539a: If you're interested in quests, I heard my friend the cook in Lumbridge Castle is in need of a hand. Just talk to him and he'll set you off.
textByHash.b0b055c7c0c83c3d399b2431af50c91b34819a0d: Using a range cuts down the possibility of burning the food. In fact, the range in the Lumbridge Castle is particularly good for some foods, I hear.
textByHash.d6e40fdf39f78ddf421c2c3162882990862cb150: Compare the skills you learn to the effort put into making the food and the health that it heals, find a good combination for you.
textByHash.885f60f7a7fd0e8aed242ef07a91d837496b72ca: As you get better and better you'll find that you can cook better food such as pizza! These are very good for healing you when fighting the big monsters.
textByHash.a5a09e34f5272665aab0e08ce58bb6d69ae3595b: It seems we have a real master chef in our mists. Maybe you should be the one giving me cooking advice.
textByHash.f885d06a4d6132122a648bb3f47f758822aadec7: If you feel up to the task, you could try your hand at making pizza. A pizza is comprised of flour with water/ Put some tomato on there, sprinkle on some cheese then cook it. You might consider adding a topping too.
textByHash.010b57f66e18241c5607c7947a43971246d7f845: Potatoes are another great food, but I won't go into much detail about those I'm afraid.
textByHash.ccf04b3373292d6a29b8c98d16960f1f9e3923a3: Of course, you can try making a curry or baked potato if you feel up to it.
textByHash.ad5cad246e7d1dc0b822fe66a467d044631e0172: Finally cook your pie by using the unbaked pie on a cooking range. Mmmm...pie.
textByHash.f2ca6193b18f4aa617ae442b2a72643c6921b68d: There's pizza too! Find yourself some tomato and cheese, use on the Pizza dough. Cook the pizza on a range then add any other toppings you want, such as anchovies.
textByHash.b2f32f698990981e5d1d092ec16e5d354f25df6f: Hello there! Are you interested in hearing all about cooking?
textByHash.228f12ef66c27d15fffff5c92ab0fc7b207ca895: The simplest thing to cook is raw meat or fish. Shrimp can be caught south of here, to the east of Lumbridge Swamp. You could ask the fishing tutor for a net if you have not got one.
textByHash.f2029caed3b5844afb45fcae2694cfb8b7605ade: Alternatively, you could acquire some raw beef or chicken. You can find cows and chickens north of here. Go over the bridge then follow the path north, you can't miss them!
textByHash.f8eb3bf15d465f55f493920ea80363394cd5319a: You could use my range here if you like.
textByHash.a15dc0a1207fe680ef52436e695fe7c636b7a966: If you wanted to, my friend the cook in Lumbridge Castle has a range you could use. You might find you burn even less on that range as its top notch.
textByHash.838d47d92bcf1c075ccb93e614e201255526e98e: Alternatively, you can use your own fire, but it's not as effective and the food will burn more frequently. To make a fire, use a tinderbox on some logs.
textByHash.b29462f0293ea8109c6b745172249a28cdbee895: Once you've found your range or fire, use your raw food on it. This will bring up a menu of the food you can cook. Then select the food you want.
textByHash.c69acb4bfa774a4dec8974b9b36d997a7bd1e894: When you have a full inventory of cooked food, drop the useless burnt food and find a bank.
textByHash.3ed3e7d8725252b188a601794ab5f2a9ce60b304: Is there anything else you want to know?
textByHash.9c38955532434c075bb5f3a1e48670a46594c2ae: Many things! You can cook anything from fish to poultry. You could try your hand at making baked potatoes or even brew some of the good stuff.
textByHash.aeab6de70fd6eccec976de5ecbabcf2b07039664: What would you like to hear about?
textByHash.43564ea5503664ec9e379f85050d0307efbc71ec: You might find that when killing monsters, they drop some raw meat for you to cook.
textByHash.87f67109add9b4c0dc29fca5a450b40abffe677d: Some of them might have hidden properties. Such as anglerfish, but you will find it hard getting hold of any of them at this time.
textByHash.593cb282f3a571170de787d5cbe17bf7b3a6e58b: Most of the time, cooking meat and fish requires nothing else but a range or fire. More complicated dishes might require specialized equipment.
textByHash.561b6f38f2d0363de411c0c2e6ce5a3b5ace9530: Would you like to hear about anything else I mentioned?
textByHash.5db8a80d2ce2bde8fa99e2c661803726b3f1c933: You might find it hard getting to these places but you can always buy beer at any pub. Some pubs sell unique beers too.
textByHash.c02b4c38cbd569ba3b547715129342a76fd1dd3d: They require many different ingredients to make, such as butter and vegetables, but you will find it hard to acquire the ingredients needed.
textByHash.1dbcc66b9217ff40e0bca5dac45d2da4226dea44: Next, we have pizza. You will first need to make yourself a pizza base, use a pot of flour with a bucket of water and make a pizza base.
textByHash.0f951b39d8a7726360eeb1a4003d5af26464ec8e: If you want to, you could add yourself a topping to the pizza too. Why not try some anchovies?
textByHash.cdb789ff5a257e1cafffd3e767ee3eb2f160b3ed: Well, just come back any time you want to know how to cook up a storm!
textByHash.e06a184538ff93b989e85a6ef915b8ef1b02d757: Some foods have hidden properties. Anglerfish can provide you with an overheal effect where you have a few more hitpoints than your level. The higher your hitpoints the better the boost.
textByHash.432d55f6af52d89225b999125c859e23190341bf: Use two buckets of water, two handfuls of barley malt, 4 hops of your choice and a pot of ale yeast, then leave to ferment for a few days!
textByHash.22de63c6dc1cf22fbfd1ad6f1e024af2b38e72c8: Simply turn the tap and let the ale flow into the barrel next to the vat, then use empty beer glasses on the barrel.
textByHash.d25219a3055aed70d63e7d2c96b287229625ddc8: You'll need to churn some butter and cheese. Look for the churn icon on the minimap. There is a churn in the farm building northwest of Lumbridge.
textByHash.919265e0037f791e428d6cf608c45a0da8f2b894: Now you will need to pick your topping if you want one. Get yourself a bowel and create the perfect topping. Then put the topping onto the potato.
textByHash.9dca639e3eb737bf9a73540983dcbb6608b9bca5: Some pies might even be able to boost some of your skills, be it temporarily.
textByHash.dc1c54cc82778bd4c13b937f079fd42f4d6c632b: I'm sure you'll like them! What about you, Can I help you?
